series_metadata.series_description: OPERS form that is completed by an employee and certified by the employer. This form certifies the dates that a former employee worked in the office of the Treasurer of State, so that the former employee can receive OPERS credit for that period of time.

retention_rules.disposition: Microform: Retain for 50 years after the employee''s date of separation, then destroy. 1 copy stored on-site, and 1 copy stored off-site. ; Paper: Retain for 6 years after employee''s date of separation, and then destroy provided microfilm copies are checked for accuracy and completeness., Microform: Shred ; Paper: Shred
